prompt_en: A child launching a kite into the air, where the wind catches and pulls it upward.
A group of firefighters work together, battling the flames and saving lives
Dog firefighter rescues kittens from a tree
Two dogs play tug-of-war with a rope toy in the backyard.
Football players bump into each other during a game
Man teaches robot to play chess, both concentrating deeply on the game.
Dapper wolf discusses stock market trends
A child jumping onto a trampoline, compressing the surface and bouncing back into the air.
A frog leaping onto a wet rock, causing droplets to splash into the air.
Grandmother bakes cookies with her granddaughter in the kitchen.
Two anthropomorphic cats in comfy boxing gear and bright gloves fight intensely on a spotlighted stage.
